description: Instrument provider calls, retrieval stages, Oban runs, candidate routing, review latency, promotion yield, cost, retries, and terminal failures with bounded-cardinality telemetry. Define SLOs and alert thresholds for stale schedules, repeated source failures, queue backlog, budget exhaustion, and zero-yield runs. Acceptance: tests assert emitted events/measurements and an operator can trace one run from program or source through findings without reading raw logs.
title: Add acquisition telemetry SLOs and alerts
